method_en: Model-assisted scenario probabilities synthesized from every platform below in the pyramid — NOT market-implied (not option-implied). L1 scenario space + L2 driver dictionary are a curated KB; L3 reads each sibling platform's snapshot, normalizes 10 drivers into a state vector, and deterministically derives a baseline distribution via prior + coverage-shrunk softmax; L4/L5 are calibrated by Claude (rules fallback if no key). Each probability is attributed to the pyramid drivers that move it (proxy attribution).
method_zh: 由金字塔下方每個平台合成的 model-assisted 情境機率 — 非市場隱含機率(非選擇權隱含)。L1 情境空間 + L2 driver 字典為策展知識庫;L3 讀取每個 sibling 平台的 snapshot,把 10 個 driver 正規化成 state vector,再用 prior + coverage 收斂的 softmax 決定性導出基準分布;L4/L5 由 Claude 校準(無 key 時走規則 fallback)。每個機率都歸因到推動它的金字塔 driver(近似歸因)。
disclaimer_zh: 模型輔助情境機率 — 非市場隱含機率。

base_narrative.en: The signature divergence: AI demand still reads strong, but payback is burning/under-earning, the bubble runs hot, and capital is quietly draining from risk. Strength on the surface, deteriorating internals underneath — the classic late-cycle top.
base_narrative.zh: 招牌背離:AI 需求帳面仍強,但回本在燒錢/賺不回,泡沫燒得熱,資金卻悄悄撤離風險。表面強、內裡弱 — 典型的後段見頂。

drivers.note_en: CFNAI activity + 3m/10y curve + TSMC-negative count from the Economic Monitor.
drivers.note_zh: 經濟指標的 CFNAI 活動指數 + 3m/10y 曲線 + TSMC 利空計數。

drivers.note_en: CPI YoY + curve; re-accelerating inflation / rate pressure reads negative.
drivers.note_zh: CPI 年增 + 曲線;通膨再加速 / 利率壓力讀為負。

drivers.note_en: AI Bubble composite (0-100); hotter = more negative for sustainable risk.
drivers.note_zh: AI 泡沫 composite(0-100);越熱對可持續風險越負。
資金流向雷達的邊際方向(-100..100)。

drivers.note_en: Retail-vs-institution divergence; retail euphoria vs institutions de-risking reads negative.
drivers.note_zh: 散戶對機構背離;散戶狂熱對機構降風險讀為負。
資本支出回本覆蓋率 + 判定(變現/投入/燒錢)。
議價能力分數 + 判定(定價權/中性/受擠壓)。

drivers.note_en: AI Compute Demand grand-total end-year vs baseline.
drivers.note_zh: AI 算力需求年末總量 vs 基準。
CapEx→晶圓 推估片/月 vs 基準。

drivers.note_en: Rival Radar event density / freshness; more competitive/customer-flow pressure reads negative for the foundry.
drivers.note_zh: 競爭者雷達事件密度/新鮮度;競爭/客戶流出壓力越大、對代工越負。

context_drivers.note_en: Upcoming earnings load (0-1); used only to time when scenarios get tested, not weighted into the distribution.
context_drivers.note_zh: 即將到來的法說密度(0-1);只用來判斷情境何時被驗證,不計入分布加權。

context_drivers.note_en: Rack-scale system count as supply-chain context; pure context, low weight.
context_drivers.note_zh: rack-scale 系統數作為供應鏈背景;純背景、低權重。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health weighs against this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度不利於此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Pricing power supports this scenario (score 64.5, verdict defensible).
attribution.reason_zh: 議價能力支撐此情境(score 64.5, verdict defensible)。

attribution.reason_en: Inflation & rates weighs against this scenario (CPI YoY 4.2%).
attribution.reason_zh: 通膨與利率不利於此情境(CPI YoY 4.2%)。

attribution.reason_en: Bubble heat weighs against this scenario (composite 64.6, zone hot).
attribution.reason_zh: 泡沫溫度不利於此情境(composite 64.6, zone hot)。

narrative.en: Growth cools without breaking, inflation drifts toward target, and the rally broadens beyond the megacap AI leaders. AI capex keeps paying off as monetization catches up to spend — a healthy, sustainable risk-on regime.
narrative.zh: 成長降溫但不失速,通膨向目標靠攏,行情從少數 AI 權值股向外擴散。AI 資本支出隨變現追上投入而持續回本 — 健康、可持續的 risk-on 體制。

market_path.equities_en: Broad equities grind higher; equal-weight catches up to cap-weight.
market_path.equities_zh: 大盤緩步走高;等權重追上市值加權。
market_path.rates_en: Yields ease gently as inflation cools; curve re-steepens benignly.
market_path.rates_zh: 通膨降溫,殖利率溫和回落;殖利率曲線良性陡峭化。
market_path.credit_en: Spreads stay tight; credit confirms the expansion.
market_path.credit_zh: 利差維持收斂;信用面確認擴張。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis hold leadership but breadth improves — less concentration risk.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體維持領先但廣度改善 — 集中度風險下降。

en: Disinflation continues with stable employment
Hyperscaler payback coverage improves quarter over quarter
Breadth (equal-weight vs cap-weight) turns positive
zh: 通膨持續回落且就業穩定
雲端巨頭回本覆蓋率逐季改善
廣度(等權 vs 市值加權)轉正

en: Inflation re-accelerates and forces rates higher
Payback deteriorates while capex keeps climbing
zh: 通膨再加速、逼升利率
capex 續攀但回本惡化

foundry_read.en: Best case for leading-edge foundry: durable, broad-based demand with pricing power intact and order visibility extending.
foundry_read.zh: 先進製程代工的最佳情境:需求持久且廣、議價權完好、訂單能見度延長。

attribution.reason_en: Bubble heat supports this scenario (composite 64.6, zone hot).
attribution.reason_zh: 泡沫溫度支撐此情境(composite 64.6, zone hot)。

attribution.reason_en: Capital flow direction weighs against this scenario (marginal -16.5).
attribution.reason_zh: 資金流向不利於此情境(marginal -16.5)。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health supports this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度支撐此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Pricing power supports this scenario (score 64.5, verdict defensible).
attribution.reason_zh: 議價能力支撐此情境(score 64.5, verdict defensible)。

narrative.en: Ample liquidity and FOMO drive a late-stage blow-off: valuations stretch, retail piles in, momentum dominates. Fun while it lasts, but it builds the fragility for a later unwind.
narrative.zh: 充裕流動性與 FOMO 推動晚期噴出:估值拉伸、散戶湧入、動能主導。當下熱鬧,卻為日後的反轉累積脆弱性。

market_path.equities_en: Index melts up on multiple expansion, led by the hottest names.
market_path.equities_zh: 指數靠本益比擴張噴出,由最熱門個股領漲。
market_path.rates_en: Rates a sideshow; liquidity and risk appetite dominate.
market_path.rates_zh: 利率成配角;流動性與風險偏好主導。
market_path.credit_en: Spreads ultra-tight, complacent — masking building risk.
market_path.credit_zh: 利差極窄、自滿 — 掩蓋累積中的風險。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis go parabolic; concentration and valuation reach extremes.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體拋物線上衝;集中度與估值達極端。

en: Net liquidity expanding while retail proxies surge
VIX pinned low as call-buying accelerates
Bubble-heat composite pushing into alert zone
zh: 淨流動性擴張且散戶代理噴出
VIX 被壓低、買權加速
泡沫溫度 composite 推進警戒區

en: Liquidity tide turns down
A credit or vol shock breaks the momentum
zh: 流動性潮汐轉降
信用或波動衝擊打斷動能

foundry_read.en: Order book looks euphoric; beware double-ordering and a demand air-pocket once the melt-up exhausts.
foundry_read.zh: 訂單看似狂熱;留意重複下單,以及噴出耗盡後的需求空窗。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health supports this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度支撐此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Bubble heat supports this scenario (composite 64.6, zone hot).
attribution.reason_zh: 泡沫溫度支撐此情境(composite 64.6, zone hot)。

attribution.reason_en: Compute demand supports this scenario (grand_total 649.5 vs 591).
attribution.reason_zh: 算力需求支撐此情境(grand_total 649.5 vs 591)。

attribution.reason_en: Capital flow direction supports this scenario (marginal -16.5).
attribution.reason_zh: 資金流向支撐此情境(marginal -16.5)。

narrative.en: The signature divergence: AI demand still reads strong, but payback is burning/under-earning, the bubble runs hot, and capital is quietly draining from risk. Strength on the surface, deteriorating internals underneath — the classic late-cycle top.
narrative.zh: 招牌背離:AI 需求帳面仍強,但回本在燒錢/賺不回,泡沫燒得熱,資金卻悄悄撤離風險。表面強、內裡弱 — 典型的後段見頂。

market_path.equities_en: Index holds near highs on narrow leadership while breadth and credit quietly deteriorate.
market_path.equities_zh: 指數靠少數權值股撐在高檔,廣度與信用悄悄惡化。
market_path.rates_en: Rates ambiguous; the tell is in credit and positioning, not yields.
market_path.rates_zh: 利率訊號模糊;真正的 tell 在信用與部位,不在殖利率。
market_path.credit_en: Spreads start to widen at the margin — the earliest crack.
market_path.credit_zh: 利差在邊際開始走擴 — 最早的裂縫。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis still leading the tape but on thinning participation; payback fears build.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體仍領漲但參與度變薄;回本疑慮升高。

en: Compute demand strong while payback verdict is investing/burning
Bubble heat hot while capital flow turns negative
Retail euphoria vs institutions de-risking
zh: 算力需求強、但回本判定為投入期/燒錢
泡沫熱、同時資金流向轉負
散戶狂熱對機構降風險

en: Payback coverage inflects up decisively
Flows turn risk-on while breadth broadens
zh: 回本覆蓋率明確向上轉折
資金轉 risk-on 且廣度擴散

foundry_read.en: Demand prints look great, but this is when to watch for inventory/double-ordering and a sudden capex pause downstream.
foundry_read.zh: 需求數字看起來很好,但正是要盯庫存/重複下單、以及下游 capex 突然喊停的時點。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health supports this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度支撐此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Pricing power weighs against this scenario (score 64.5, verdict defensible).
attribution.reason_zh: 議價能力不利於此情境(score 64.5, verdict defensible)。

attribution.reason_en: Inflation & rates supports this scenario (CPI YoY 4.2%).
attribution.reason_zh: 通膨與利率支撐此情境(CPI YoY 4.2%)。

attribution.reason_en: Capital flow direction supports this scenario (marginal -16.5).
attribution.reason_zh: 資金流向支撐此情境(marginal -16.5)。

narrative.en: Macro data softens enough to spook the market without breaking it. Capital rotates out of crowded AI leaders into defensives/value; a correction, not a crash. Risk-off warms but the system holds.
narrative.zh: 總體數據走弱到足以驚嚇市場、但未崩。資金從擁擠的 AI 權值股輪出到防禦/價值股;是修正、不是崩盤。risk-off 升溫但系統撐住。

market_path.equities_en: Index pulls back; leadership rotates from growth/AI to defensives and value.
market_path.equities_zh: 指數回檔;領漲族群從成長/AI 輪向防禦與價值。
market_path.rates_en: Yields fall on growth fears; duration outperforms.
market_path.rates_zh: 成長疑慮下殖利率走低;長天期表現較佳。
market_path.credit_en: Spreads widen moderately but no systemic stress.
market_path.credit_zh: 利差中度走擴,但無系統性壓力。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis correct hardest as the most crowded trade unwinds.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體修正最深,最擁擠交易解開。

en: Macro cycle (CFNAI/curve) rolls over
Crowded AI leadership starts to lag
Flows turn risk-off without credit breaking
zh: 總體景氣(CFNAI/曲線)轉弱
擁擠的 AI 領漲開始落後
資金轉 risk-off 但信用未破

en: Macro re-accelerates
AI leadership reasserts with broadening breadth
zh: 總體重新加速
AI 領先重新確立且廣度擴散

foundry_read.en: A demand wobble, not a collapse: orders soften at the margin; pricing tested but defensible for leading-edge.
foundry_read.zh: 需求晃動而非崩塌:訂單在邊際走軟;先進製程議價受測試但仍可守。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health supports this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度支撐此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Pricing power weighs against this scenario (score 64.5, verdict defensible).
attribution.reason_zh: 議價能力不利於此情境(score 64.5, verdict defensible)。

attribution.reason_en: Capital flow direction supports this scenario (marginal -16.5).
attribution.reason_zh: 資金流向支撐此情境(marginal -16.5)。

attribution.reason_en: Bubble heat supports this scenario (composite 64.6, zone hot).
attribution.reason_zh: 泡沫溫度支撐此情境(composite 64.6, zone hot)。

narrative.en: A credit or liquidity shock breaks the regime: spreads gap wider, the liquidity tide goes out, and risk assets de-rate together. Low probability, high impact — the tail that matters.
narrative.zh: 信用或流動性衝擊打破體制:利差跳開、流動性潮汐退去,風險資產一起重定價。低機率、高衝擊 — 真正要緊的尾部。

market_path.equities_en: Broad, correlated de-rating; no place to hide except cash and quality.
market_path.equities_zh: 全面、高相關重定價;除了現金與品質,無處可躲。
market_path.rates_en: Flight to safety; quality duration rallies hard, junk gets crushed.
market_path.rates_zh: 避險買盤;品質長天期大漲,垃圾債被輾壓。
market_path.credit_en: HY OAS gaps wider; this is the epicenter.
market_path.credit_zh: 高收益利差跳開;這裡是震央。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis fall hardest given valuation and crowding.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體因估值與擁擠跌最重。

en: HY OAS widening sharply with VIX spiking
Net liquidity contracting for weeks
A funding/credit event forces deleveraging
zh: 高收益利差急擴且 VIX 飆升
淨流動性連續數週收縮
融資/信用事件迫使去槓桿

en: Liquidity backstop restored
Credit spreads stabilize and re-tighten
zh: 流動性後盾恢復
信用利差穩定並重新收斂

foundry_read.en: Sharp downside: orders cut, capex frozen, pricing pressured — but leading-edge scarcity cushions the best nodes.
foundry_read.zh: 急跌風險:砍單、凍結 capex、價格受壓 — 但先進製程稀缺性為最尖端節點提供緩衝。

attribution.reason_en: AI payback health supports this scenario (coverage 0.222, verdict burning).
attribution.reason_zh: AI 回本健康度支撐此情境(coverage 0.222, verdict burning)。

attribution.reason_en: Pricing power weighs against this scenario (score 64.5, verdict defensible).
attribution.reason_zh: 議價能力不利於此情境(score 64.5, verdict defensible)。

attribution.reason_en: Compute demand weighs against this scenario (grand_total 649.5 vs 591).
attribution.reason_zh: 算力需求不利於此情境(grand_total 649.5 vs 591)。

attribution.reason_en: Competitive pressure supports this scenario (23 events).
attribution.reason_zh: 競爭壓力支撐此情境(23 events)。

narrative.en: AI-specific de-rating: hyperscalers actively pull back capex as payback disappoints and pricing gets squeezed. Compute and wafer demand momentum rolls over. The broad market may hold, but the AI/semi complex re-rates down.
narrative.zh: AI 專屬重定價:回本令人失望、價格遭擠壓,雲端巨頭主動收手 capex。算力與晶圓需求動能轉弱。大盤或許撐住,但 AI/半導體板塊向下重定價。

market_path.equities_en: Broad index resilient; the damage concentrates in AI/semis and infra.
market_path.equities_zh: 大盤相對抗跌;傷害集中在 AI/半導體與基礎設施。
market_path.rates_en: Rates neutral; this is a sector story, not a macro one.
market_path.rates_zh: 利率中性;這是產業故事、非總體故事。
market_path.credit_en: Broad credit calm; stress isolated to AI-levered issuers.
market_path.credit_zh: 整體信用平靜;壓力侷限於 AI 高槓桿發行人。
market_path.ai_semis_en: AI/semis de-rate hard on capex cuts and payback disappointment.
market_path.ai_semis_zh: AI/半導體因砍 capex 與回本失望而重挫。

en: Payback verdict burning while pricing squeezed
Compute/wafer demand momentum turning down
Hyperscaler capex guidance cut
zh: 回本判定燒錢、同時定價受擠壓
算力/晶圓需求動能轉降
雲端巨頭 capex 指引下修

en: Capex guidance reaffirmed or raised
Payback coverage stabilizes and pricing firms
zh: capex 指引重申或上調
回本覆蓋率穩定且價格回穩

foundry_read.en: Most direct hit to leading-edge foundry: utilization and pricing at risk as the AI build pauses — the scenario to hedge.
foundry_read.zh: 對先進製程代工最直接的衝擊:AI 建置暫停,稼動率與價格承壓 — 最該避險的情境。

divergences.en: Classic late-cycle top: AI demand still strong while payback burns, the bubble runs hot, and capital is draining from risk.
divergences.zh: 典型後段見頂:AI 需求仍強,但回本在燒、泡沫熱、資金正撤離風險。

divergences.en: Demand is rising but payback is deteriorating — spend is outrunning monetization.
divergences.zh: 需求上升但回本惡化 — 投入跑在變現前面。

divergences.en: Our base case (Late-cycle topping) differs from the Capital Flow Radar's own top read (Rotation → AI grinds, breadth broadens).
divergences.zh: 本平台 base case(後段見頂)與資金流向雷達自身首選(輪動→AI緩升，廣度擴散)不一致。

flows_scenarios.name_en: Liquidity ebb → AI corrects, index softer
flows_scenarios.name_zh: 流動性退潮→AI回調，指數走軟

cross_checks.note_en: flows' own distribution — same-source cross-check, not weighted in.
cross_checks.note_zh: flows 自身分布 — 同源對賬,未計入加權。

base_narrative.en: The signature divergence: AI demand still reads strong, but payback is burning/under-earning, the bubble runs hot, and capital is quietly draining from risk. Strength on the surface, deteriorating internals underneath — the classic late-cycle top.
base_narrative.zh: 招牌背離:AI 需求帳面仍強,但回本在燒錢/賺不回,泡沫燒得熱,資金卻悄悄撤離風險。表面強、內裡弱 — 典型的後段見頂。

scenarios.rationale_en: Baseline 3% held near floor. Payback burning (-0.72, coverage 0.222) directly contradicts a healthy broadening; pricing power +0.44 offers only marginal support. Nudged +1.
scenarios.rationale_zh: 基線3%,維持低位。回收健康度-0.72(覆蓋率0.222)嚴重不利於良性擴散;定價權+0.44僅微弱支撐。上調1點。

scenarios.rationale_en: Bubble heat still hot (64.6) but composite reading -0.29 and flows draining (-0.17, marginal -16.5) undercut a pure melt-up. Trimmed to 9.
scenarios.rationale_zh: 泡沫熱度仍高(64.6),但綜合值-0.29且資金流出(-0.17,邊際-16.5),削弱純噴發格局。下調至9。

scenarios.rationale_en: The high-conviction divergence: demand strong (compute +0.20, 649.5 vs 591) while payback burns (-0.72), bubble hot (64.6) and flows drain (-0.17). This textbook late-cycle top dominates; nudged 51→52.
Rival pressure elevated (-0.46, 23 events) and inflation sticky (CPI 4.2%, -0.37) support rotation risk, but strong compute demand caps it. Held at 14.
scenarios.rationale_zh: 對手壓力升高(-0.46,23事件)且通膨黏著(CPI 4.2%,-0.37)支撐輪動風險,但強算力需求封頂。維持14。

scenarios.rationale_en: Flows draining and inflation-rates -0.37 keep tail alive, but 3m10y at 0.63 (un-inverted) and CFNAI -0.1 argue no imminent break. Trimmed to 11.
scenarios.rationale_zh: 資金流出與通膨利率-0.37維持尾部,但3m10y達0.63(未倒掛)、CFNAI -0.1顯示尚無立即斷裂。下調至11。

scenarios.rationale_en: Payback burning (-0.72) and demand_vs_payback_gap keep this relevant, but compute demand still rising (+0.20) delays the air-pocket. Held at 10.
scenarios.rationale_zh: 回收燃燒(-0.72)與需求-回收缺口使其相關,但算力需求仍升(+0.20)延後空窗。維持10。

base_case.thesis_en: Late-cycle topping is the base case: AI demand still rises (compute +0.20) while monetization deteriorates (payback -0.72, coverage 0.222), the bubble runs hot (64.6) and capital drains (-0.17). Spend outruns payback — a classic top that grinds before it cracks.
base_case.thesis_zh: 基本情境為週期末端見頂:AI需求仍升(算力+0.20),但變現惡化(回收-0.72,覆蓋率0.222)、泡沫熱(64.6)、資金外流(-0.17)。支出超前回收——典型見頂,先磨頂後裂解。

tail_risk.why_en: Low-prob (11%) high-impact: with flows draining (-0.17) and rates sticky (CPI 4.2%, -0.37), a topping tape can flip into a credit/liquidity break if funding stress hits. Worth hedging even though 3m10y (0.63) is not yet inverted.
tail_risk.why_zh: 低機率(11%)高衝擊:資金外流(-0.17)且利率黏著(CPI 4.2%,-0.37),若融資壓力來襲,磨頂可能轉為信用/流動性斷裂。雖3m10y(0.63)未倒掛,仍值得對沖。

expected_market_path.equities_en: Choppy, narrowing breadth; index grinds higher on megacaps then rolls over as flows fade.
expected_market_path.equities_zh: 震盪、廣度收窄;指數靠權值股磨高後隨資金退潮翻轉。
expected_market_path.rates_en: Sticky front end (CPI 4.2%); long end range-bound, 3m10y stays modestly positive at 0.63.
expected_market_path.rates_zh: 前端黏著(CPI 4.2%);長端區間,3m10y維持小幅正值0.63。
expected_market_path.credit_en: Spreads calm now but fragile; widening risk builds as capital drains (-0.17).
expected_market_path.credit_zh: 利差暫穩但脆弱;隨資金外流(-0.17)擴大風險累積。
expected_market_path.ai_semis_en: Demand headlines strong (649.5) mask payback burn (0.222 coverage); leaders top on multiple compression, not demand collapse.
expected_market_path.ai_semis_zh: 需求標題強(649.5)掩蓋回收燃燒(覆蓋率0.222);龍頭因估值壓縮見頂,而非需求崩塌。

watch.en: Payback coverage trend (now 0.222, burning) — the core of the topping thesis.
watch.zh: 回收覆蓋率趨勢(現0.222,燃燒)——見頂論點核心。

watch.en: Capital flow marginal (-16.5) — acceleration of drain would confirm topping into break.
watch.zh: 資金邊際流向(-16.5)——外流加速將由見頂轉向斷裂。

watch.en: Bubble heat composite (64.6, hot zone) — a rollover confirms the top.
watch.zh: 泡沫熱度綜合(64.6,熱區)——回落確認見頂。

watch.en: Compute demand (649.5 vs 591) — if it rolls, air-pocket risk jumps.
watch.zh: 算力需求(649.5對591)——若走弱,空窗風險躍升。

watch.en: Rival pressure events (23) — escalation feeds rotation/pricing-power erosion.
watch.zh: 競爭壓力事件(23)——升級將助長輪動與定價權侵蝕。

falsification.en: Payback coverage recovers above ~0.5 with pricing power holding — thesis breaks toward soft-landing broadening.
falsification.zh: 回收覆蓋率回升至約0.5以上且定價權維持——論點轉向軟著陸擴散。

falsification.en: Flows turn net positive (marginal flips from -16.5) while bubble heat cools — melt-up regains odds.
falsification.zh: 資金轉淨流入(邊際由-16.5翻正)且泡沫降溫——噴發情境回升。

falsification.en: Compute demand accelerates while payback also improves — spend/monetization gap closes, no top.
falsification.zh: 算力需求加速且回收同步改善——支出/變現缺口收斂,見頂不成立。

early_warning.en: Capital flow radar marginal reading turning more negative.
early_warning.zh: 資金流雷達邊際讀數轉更負。

early_warning.en: Bubble heat composite crossing out of hot zone (below ~60).
early_warning.zh: 泡沫熱度綜合跌出熱區(低於約60)。

early_warning.en: Rival pressure event count rising above 23.

sensitivity.if_zh: 算力需求由649.5進一步上升。
sensitivity.moves_en: Base case +13pt; a drop cuts it -16pt — the single largest lever.
sensitivity.moves_zh: 基本情境+13點;下滑則-16點——最大槓桿。

sensitivity.moves_en: Base case -13pt (topping needs draining flows); further drain +7pt.
sensitivity.moves_zh: 基本情境-13點(見頂需資金外流);續流出+7點。

sensitivity.moves_en: Base case +9pt; a decline -11pt (note: seed source, lower weight).
sensitivity.moves_zh: 基本情境+9點;下滑-11點(注意:seed來源,權重較低)。

sensitivity.moves_en: Base case -10pt (healing undercuts topping); further burn +5pt.
sensitivity.moves_zh: 基本情境-10點(改善削弱見頂);續燃燒+5點。

sensitivity.moves_en: Base case -9pt (tilts to melt-up); cooling +7pt confirms top.
sensitivity.moves_zh: 基本情境-9點(偏向噴發);降溫+7點確認見頂。

blind_spots_en: Probabilities are model-assisted (prior + driver evidence + Claude calibration), NOT market-implied — treat as a structured opinion, not a forecast.
Drivers are read from sibling platforms whose own snapshots may be seed/stale; the coverage figure shows how much is live.
Sentiment/positioning are proxied through the underlying platforms, not measured directly; reflexivity between platforms is reconciled but not eliminated.
Probability attribution is a proxy decomposition of the softmax logit contribution, not an exact per-point sensitivity.
blind_spots_zh: 機率為 model-assisted(prior + driver 證據 + Claude 校準),非市場隱含 — 視為結構化觀點,非預測。
Driver 取自各 sibling 平台,其 snapshot 可能為種子/過時;coverage 數字顯示有多少是即時的。
情緒/部位以底層平台代理,非直接量測;平台間的反身性已對賬但未消除。
機率歸因為 softmax logit 貢獻的近似拆解,非逐點精確敏感度。
